nodes.context: Neo-Nazi group focused on white power music and recruitment, with chapters worldwide.

Defunct faction of the Hammerskins that attended NordicFest and planned security for a KKK event.
Australian chapter of the Hammerskins, founded in 1993, active in multiple cities.
Support group for Hammerskins, used as a moniker for supporters in Australia and Finland.
Neo-Nazi music network and group, allied with Hammerskins in Australia and Finland.
Neo-Nazi combat sports collective connected to the Nordic Resistance Movement, allied with Hammerskins in Finland.
Neo-Nazi organization, connected to Veren Laki.
Neo-Nazi terrorist group, whose Finnish members frequented Crew 38 headquarters.
Italian chapter of the Hammerskins, with branches in multiple cities.

nodes.context: KKK group that hosted a white pride festival where Outlaw Hammerskins planned to provide security.

edges.context: Hammerskins emerged from the Confederate Hammerskins.
Outlaw Hammerskins were a faction of the Hammerskins.
Southern Cross Hammerskins is the Australian chapter of the Hammerskins.
Crew 38 is a support group for Hammerskins.
Lealtà e Azione is the Italian chapter of the Hammerskins.
Bran.co is the antiabortion branch of Lealtà e Azione.
Southern Cross Hammerskins and Blood & Honour Australia co-hosted the Ian Stuart Donaldson Memorial Concert.
Finnish Blood & Honour organized White Boy Summer Fest together with Hammerskins (Crew 38) and Veren Laki.
Crew 38, Blood & Honour, and Veren Laki co-organized White Boy Summer Fest.
Veren Laki is a neo-Nazi combat sports collective connected to the Nordic Resistance Movement.
Finnish Atomwaffen members frequented Crew 38 headquarters; a Canadian Atomwaffen member trained with Hammerskins in Finland.
Infobox lists Rise Above Movement as an affiliation.
Infobox lists Blue-and-Black Movement as an affiliation.

edges.target: National Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
edges.context: Outlaw Hammerskins planned to provide security for a white pride festival hosted by the National Knights of the Ku Klux Klan.
